name: leeguooooo-plugins
description: Developer plugins by leeguooooo — for Claude Code, Cursor, and more.

plugins.name: prompt-language-coach
plugins.description: Real-time language coaching in Claude Code. Auto-corrects your writing and provides natural expressions on every prompt. Supports any language pair.

plugins.name: zentao-plugin
plugins.description: Use ZenTao from Claude Code through the local zentao CLI. Inspect products, bugs, tasks, and run self-test workflows.

plugins.name: yapi-plugin
plugins.description: Use YApi from Claude Code through the local yapi CLI. Inspect interfaces and sync API docs.

plugins.name: curl-crypto-plugin
plugins.description: Decrypt encrypted curl request parameters and encrypt payloads for test-service calls.
